extraction.one_line_summary: HOARAU Mateo won stage 19 in a photo finish over ASGREEN Kasper after a 172km race decided by centimeters on the line
tactical_patterns: POLITT Nils snapped chain while drilling breakaway pace, suggesting mechanical vulnerability when riders exceed sustainable power thresholds
PEDERSEN Mads attempted solo 500m sprint but faded, revealing sprinters avoiding lead-out trains often miscalculate sustainable sprint distance
VAN DER POEL Mathieu led out PEDERSEN despite green jersey competition, indicating team orders override individual classification battles late-tour

rider_signals.PEDERSEN Mads: negative: launched 500m sprint but faded badly, confirming he lacks sustainable power for long solo efforts
rider_signals.POLITT Nils: negative: snapped chain while driving breakaway tempo then received wrong pedal spare bike, catastrophic equipment management failure
rider_signals.ASGREEN Kasper: positive: finished second in photo after winning previous day, showing consistent sprint form deep into third week
rider_signals.VAN DER POEL Mathieu: neutral: provided lead-out for PEDERSEN despite green jersey battle, suggesting prioritization of stage wins over points
rider_signals.PHILIPSEN Jasper: negative: finished fourth despite green jersey, revealing positioning weakness when VAN DER POEL commits to rival lead-out
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: neutral: 7:35 lead unchallenged on stage 19, conserving energy before final mountain stage
rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: neutral: recovered position after Alps struggles, preparing offensive for stage 20 mountain finale
